zh.lifeSummary: Sybil Monington是Sir Thomas Monington和Elizabeth Milbourne的女兒，出生。她於1511年與Edward Trye在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾哈德維其可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1532年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾哈德維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Monington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Monnington
meanings: English: locative name from Monnington on Wye or Monnington Straddle in Vowchurch (both Herefs).

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Sybil Monington was born as the daughter of Sir Thomas Monington and Elizabeth Milbourne. She married Edward Trye in 1511, in Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1532, in Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil MoningtonはSir Thomas MoningtonとElizabeth Milbourneの娘として生まれた。1511年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアハードウィクでEdward Tryeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1532年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアハードウィクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil Monington(은)는 Sir Thomas Monington(와)과 Elizabeth Milbourne의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1511년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 하르드윅에서 Edward Trye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 하르드윅에서 사망했다.
